_meta.voice: Direct American English. High-end renovation contractor voice (Nice / French Riviera). Designer-led, premium positioning. Source site runs in RU + EN + FR — the case-study copy itself is the brand's external pitch.

strings.*Зручна адмін панель* для додавання конт: *Easy admin panel* for adding content to the site
strings.3 мови: RU, EN, FR · 1 калькулятор для о: 3 languages: RU, EN, FR · 1 renovation-estimate calculator · 13+ service lines · 1 SEO structure tuned for local search
strings.SEO-структура під локальний пошук: SEO structure tuned for local search
strings.Solide Renovation - сайт для компанії з: Solide Renovation — site for a turnkey designer-led renovation firm
strings.Solide Renovation — компанія, яка займає: Solide Renovation is a turnkey designer-led renovation firm operating in Nice and across the French Riviera: from light cosmetic refreshes to full villa and apartment reconstructions. We built a conversion-driven digital structure for a high-ticket service — where the user quickly sees the level of work, understands the scope of services, can get a rough renovation estimate through a calculator, and submits a consultation request. The site isn't an online business card; it's a client-acquisition tool built on trust, portfolio, and a clear structure.
strings.Бізнес працює з дорогою послугою, де ріш: The business sells an expensive service that buyers don't decide on impulse
strings.Важливо було знизити бар'єр перед зверне: We had to lower the barrier to inquiry: give the client a way to rough-size their job up front
strings.Великий перелік послуг потрібно було чіт: The long service list needed clear structuring
strings.Головна задача — сайт, який продає через: The core task — a site that sells through trust, structure, portfolio, and a frictionless path to inquiry
strings.Додали форму заявки з відправкою звернен: Added an inquiry form that sends submissions to Telegram — a short path from interest to contact
strings.Змінювати зображення та додавати нові фо: Swap images and add new photos
strings.Зробили візуальну подачу, яка відповідає: Built a visual presentation that fits the premium-renovation segment
strings.Керувати товарами, послугами, цінами, ст: Manage products, services, prices, articles, cases, and reviews
strings.Керувати тільки потрібними розділами без: Edit only the sections you need without risking the site's design
strings.Компанія працює з різними мовними аудито: The company serves several language audiences in France — the site structure had to reflect that
strings.Користувачу важливо побачити реальні про: The user needs to see real projects before the first inquiry
strings.Оформили портфоліо з реальними проєктами: Built a portfolio of real projects — villas, apartments, bathrooms, restorations — as the main trust block
strings.Передбачили кілька CTA на різних рівнях: Placed several CTAs at different page levels
strings.Побудували головну сторінку як продаючу: Built the homepage as a sales structure: first screen with positioning and a CTA, services, portfolio, advantages, approach, and a second CTA
strings.Працювати з адмінкою навіть з телефону: Run the admin even from a phone
strings.Продумали SEO-структуру під локальне про: Designed the SEO structure around local promotion: dedicated service pages, portfolio, blog, clean URL structure
strings.Реалізували калькулятор для попередньої: Built a calculator for a rough renovation estimate — the user can shape an initial request before the consultation
strings.Реалізували мультимовність сайту: RU, EN: Built the multilingual site: RU, EN, and FR to serve the different client audiences in France
strings.Редагувати SEO-поля для сторінок: Edit SEO fields on every page
strings.Сайт мав пояснювати підхід компанії: від: The site had to explain the company's approach: from concept to project handover
strings.Структурували 13+ напрямів послуг: косме: Structured 13+ service lines: light cosmetic remodel, gut renovation, full project management, and more
strings.Хочу сказати велике спасибі. Все працює,: Big thanks. Everything works, everything's set up.

sections[_key==\"sec6\"].bodyEn: For a high-ticket renovation firm, a plain business-card site doesn't work. The client doesn't decide on impulse — they look for proof of the work's quality, study the approach, and want to see real projects before the first call. Without the right structure, even a strong team stays invisible to the prospective client.
sections[_key==\"sec9\"].bodyEn: We built the site for a turnkey designer-led renovation firm, focused on trust, portfolio, and a clear path to inquiry. Every block does one job: show the level of work, explain the services, pull the user into interaction, and drive them to a consultation.
sections[_key==\"fd187ec9f59b\"].bodyEn:
We set the client up with a Sanity-CMS admin panel they can run themselves without constantly reaching out to a developer. The interface works on a phone, so changes happen fast: update copy, swap an image, add a new page, or reorder blocks.

In the admin you can:
sections[_key==\"sech\"].bodyEn: Solide Renovation got a full digital tool that matches the level of the firm and the niche. The site shows the scale and quality of the work through the portfolio up front, explains the services and the approach, pulls the user in through the calculator, and drives them to an inquiry through the form or a messenger. The multilingual setup covers the firm's different client audiences in France, and the SEO structure lays the groundwork for local search promotion.
